chunks.text: P a g e 1 | 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constt: Petition No.D-285 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of main case 16-5-2025 Mr. Rashid Ali Shaikh, Advocate for the petitioner Mr. Ali Raza Baloch, Additional A.G Sindh -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned AAG submits that the petitioner was terminated from service and he has approached this Court for pensionary benefits, therefore, the instant petition is not maintainable. This fact has not been controverted by the counsel for the petitioner. Under the circumstance, the instant petition being not maintainable is hereby dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Naveed Ali
